headline: Stop gaining, start catching up: Huel and rows
summary: You're gaining 0.01 kg weekly when you need -0.67; today, use Huel discipline and exercise to reverse course immediately.
details: Today, eat only pre-portioned Huel meals and eliminate all emotional snacking—you're on the precipice of weekend patterns, so you control the narrative right now. Execute 45 minutes of rowing or treadmill work to establish the daily calorie deficit you desperately need. This one day matters because every missed day pushes you further from June 2027; start the streak today.
